description: Trigger-precision eval set: prompt -> which skill should hydrate (null = none). PASS semantics: give a router ONLY the 9 L1 descriptions; it must select one of the skills in `expected` (string = exactly one acceptable; array = any listed is a pass); should_trigger=false -> it must select NONE. Runner: skills/run_evals.py (LLM judge via claude -p). Judge is stochastic: expect +/-2 on positives across runs; negatives must always reject. Last full runs 2026-06-11: 26/26, 24/26, 24/26. Pattern after Power-Agent/PowerSkills surge evals.

cases.prompt: Add a 4-hour battery and an HVDC link to my model
Add an extendable transmission line - what capital_cost convention applies?
My optimization returns infeasible, what now?
The solve takes 6 hours, speed it up
Sanity-check my solved model
cases.note: README boundary prompt names solve-and-debug (battery); physical-realism is a defensible lexical match - both accepted

cases.prompt: Add a CO2 budget to my hydrogen model
Did linopy actually apply my reserve constraint?
Is this electrolyzer efficiency plausible?
Give me a pre-delivery checklist for my sector-coupled model
Can I merge Germany into one bus for this study?
Compute the congestion rent on the north-south corridor
Why do my model prices differ from EPEX?
What does this battery earn trading day-ahead and intraday?
Is the LCOH from my electrolyzer bankable?
Build wind capacity factors for Spain from ERA5
Update my 2020 gas price assumption to something realistic
Model district heating with heat pumps and a storage tank
Increase the cluster count in my PyPSA-Eur config and add offshore wind
Plot the dispatch for the worst week
Make my results presentable for the client
Run an AC load flow on my pandapower case39 and check voltages
cases.note: pandapower stack - no pypsa-* skill may fire

cases.prompt: Open the PSS/E sav case and run a fault study with psspy
Run a transient stability time-domain simulation after the fault
Plot a histogram of my sales data in matplotlib
cases.note: generic plotting, no energy context - reporting must not fire

cases.prompt: Check breaker duty for the new substation
Hosting capacity for rooftop PV on this OpenDSS feeder
